target: Batch: ISS-2301 OBE confirmation, ISS-2315 add CA_NONE_NOTDEMO_IDS to stratification paragraph, ISS-2334 fix DERIVES-FROM-DOME enumeration mismatch in sections.json part2b

obe_notes.ISS-2301: ISS-2301 flags EXP-437 P6 (Overview explanatory paragraph 'Two numbers, 70 and 72 - why both are real') as not integrated. Verification confirms OBE: grep of docs/index.html and build-scripts/generate-html.js both return 1 match for 'ds-counts-reading-guide' and 'Two numbers, 70 and 72'. The patch was integrated. Decider commit message count ('5 prose patches') may have been inaccurate, but the content is present.

patches.description: Add CA_NONE_NOTDEMO_IDS to the 'not demonstrated' line in the stratification paragraph (part2b). Every other verdict bucket has its WIN-IDs listed parenthetically; CA_NONE_NOTDEMO did not. Fix: add the IDs token and a tail phrase consistent with other lines.
patches.find_pattern: {{CA_NONE_NOTDEMO}} not demonstrated. These verdict-stratified counts sum to {{CA_NONE}}
patches.replace_pattern: {{CA_NONE_NOTDEMO}} not demonstrated ({{CA_NONE_NOTDEMO_IDS}}) — monitoring would validate the mechanism. These verdict-stratified counts sum to {{CA_NONE}}
patches.cosmetic_note: When CA_NONE_NOTDEMO=0 (current), CA_NONE_NOTDEMO_IDS resolves to empty string and '()' renders. Consistent with how any bucket token behaves at count=0. When count returns above 0, IDs display correctly.

patches.description: Fix DERIVES-FROM-DOME enumeration mismatch: 'The {{CA_DOME}} exceptions deserve individual scrutiny' uses CA_DOME=1 but the prose then enumerates four candidates (WIN-020, WIN-044, WIN-057, WIN-058). Only WIN-044 survives; the other three are rejected by the prose. Fix: say 'four apparent exceptions' not '{{CA_DOME}} exceptions'.
patches.replace_pattern: Four apparent exceptions deserve individual scrutiny — three fail on close examination, leaving {{CA_DOME}} genuine dome-geometry derivation:
patches.rationale: CA_DOME=1 is the count of genuine derivations. The lead-in to the four-candidate enumeration incorrectly used CA_DOME (=1) as the candidate count, producing 'The 1 exceptions' while listing four items. The corrected text preserves CA_DOME in its correct role (count of genuine derivations) while naming 'four' correctly for the enumeration lead-in.

build_note: Run node build.js html after integration to verify CA_NONE_NOTDEMO_IDS renders correctly. Run node test.js to confirm all tests pass.
